Attach the lun to host.
        :param connection_properties: The dictionary that describes all
                                      of the target lun attributes.
        :type connection_properties: dict
        :returns: dict
        connection_properties for Fibre Channel must include:
        target_wwn - World Wide Name
        target_lun - LUN id of the lun

_get_device_file_path
z+FibreChannelConnector._get_device_file_pathc
Compute the device paths on the system with an id, wwn, and lun
        :param possible_devs: list of (platform, pci_id, wwn, lun) tuples
        :return: list of device paths on the system based on the possible_devs
        )
process_lun_idrL
z'FibreChannelConnector._get_host_devicesc
Compute the possible fibre channel device options.
        :param hbas: available hba devices.
        :param targets: tuple of possible wwn addresses and lun combinations.
        :returns: list of (platform, pci_id, wwn, lun) tuples
        Given one or more wwn (mac addresses for fibre channel) ports
        do the matrix math to figure out a set of pci device, wwn
        tuples that are potentially valid (they won't all be). This
        provides a search space for the device connection.
        Nz
0x%s)
_get_pci_numrD
raw_devices
hbar[

]d}	|
Detach the lun from host.
        :param connection_properties: The dictionary that describes all
                                      of the target lun attributes.
        :type connection_properties: dict
        :param device_info: historical difference, but same as connection_props
        :type device_info: dict
        connection_properties for Fibre Channel must include:
        target_wwn - World Wide Name
        target_lun - LUN id of the lun

get_connector_properties}
z.FibreChannelConnector.get_connector_propertiesc
s4q"t
Get the target info including target wwn and LUN id, which
        mapping to the wwid.
        The wwid is used in identifying device by CAS, but the connector
        need target info to connect, disconnect or extend the backend
        storage.
        :returns: a dict with {'wwid':[(target_wwn, target_lun)]} entry.
        z
/dev/disk/by-path/pci-*-fc-*z'/dev/disk/by-path/platform-*-pci-*-fc-*z
-fc-0x(.*)-lun-(.*)rB
